# Hackapura

> Hackapura is a community-run indie hacker meetup in Singapore for makers, coders, designers, and hardware hackers building their own independent apps and startups. The group meets every Thursday for co-working and demos, and is part of the global Hacka network.

## About

- Location: Singapore
- Established: 2023
- Format: Weekly in-person co-working and demo meetup
- Schedule: Every Thursday (10am intros, then co-working through the day, with demos in the late afternoon)
- Audience: Indie hackers, solo founders, designers, and hardware hackers shipping their own projects
- Part of: [Hacka network](https://hacka.network) — a worldwide community of indie hacker meetups

## Links

- [Homepage](https://hackapura.com): Overview, schedule, and FAQ
- [RSVP / Events](https://luma.com/hackapura): Upcoming meetups on Luma
- [GitHub](https://github.com/T31K/hackapura): Source for this site
- [Hacka network](https://hacka.network): Sister communities worldwide

## Who should attend

People who code, design, or build their own products and want to co-work alongside other independent makers in Singapore. Not for agencies, recruiters, or people pitching services.
